title: Publications | Stats NZ
content:
## Net migration eases to under 30,000
New Zealand had a net migration gain of 26,400 in the March 2025 year.

## International migration: March 2025
International migration statistics give the latest outcomes-based measure of migration, which includes estimates of migrants entering or leaving New Zealand.

## International migration: February 2025
International migration statistics give the latest outcomes-based measure of migration, which includes estimates of migrants entering or leaving New Zealand.

## International migration: January 2025
International migration statistics give the latest outcomes-based measure of migration, which includes estimates of migrants entering or leaving New Zealand.

## National population estimates: At 31 December 2024 (2018-base)
National population estimates give the best available measure of the population, by age and sex, usually living in Aotearoa New Zealand.

## International migration: December 2024
International migration statistics give the latest outcomes-based measure of migration, which includes estimates of migrants entering or leaving New Zealand.

## Net migration falls in 2024
New Zealand had a net migration gain of 27,100 in 2024. This was down from a net gain of 128,300 in 2023.

## International migration: November 2024
International migration statistics give the latest outcomes-based measure of migration, which includes estimates of migrants entering or leaving New Zealand.

## CSV files for download
Download pre-packaged CSV files of data from Infoshare and Stats NZ information releases.

## International migration: October 2024
International migration statistics give the latest outcomes-based measure of migration, which includes estimates of migrants entering or leaving New Zealand.

## National population estimates: At 30 September 2024 (2018-base)
National population estimates give the best available measure of the population, by age and sex, usually living in New Zealand.

## Net migration falls to under 50,000
New Zealand had a net migration gain of 44,900 in the September 2024 year.
